# Capability: [Name]

## Business Outcome
What value does this deliver to users or the business?

## Actors
- **User**: Who initiates or benefits?
- **System**: What automated behavior is involved?
- **Admin**: Any admin involvement?

## What Should Happen
Step-by-step description of the expected behavior.

## Edge Cases
- What happens when X is missing?
- What happens when Y fails?

## Related Rules
- [Rule: Name](../rules/name)

## Related Scenarios
- [Scenario: Name](../../development/scenarios/name)

## Current vs Intended Behavior
> Note any known gaps between what the code does and what is intended.

## Unknowns
> Flag anything that is unclear or unconfirmed.
